How it works

Lock your $BONK to receive % from the BONK Rewards Pool

  • Fees collected by the BONK Ecosystem distributed to the BONK Rewards Pool
  • More $BONK locked = Larger % from BONK Rewards Pool

(T)multiplier: Multiply to the % of BONK Rewards Pool with amount of time locked

  • 1 Month - 1X
  • 3 Months - 1.4X
  • 6 Months - 2X

% from BONK Rewards Pool X (T)multiplier = $BONK claim during locking period
